Definition: The country of the site location.
The latitude of the site location.
The longitude of the site location.
The name of the network operator.
The gNodeB ID of the cell site.
The first administrative level (admin level 1) of the cell site location. Depending on locale, this can be the state, province, or region where the cell site is located.
The second administrative level (admin level 2) of the cell site location. Depending on locale, this can be the county or province where the cell site is located.
The type of cell frequency channel, such as ARFCN, UARFCN, EARFCN.
The MCC code associated with the connected cell site during the test.
The MNC code associated with the connected cell site during the test.
